hookUsed: Watch me write a $1,000 email in 30 minutes

script.words: Watch me write a $1,000 email in 30 minutes
script.visual: camera pans to a computer screen with a timer
sudden cut to a writer typing

script.words: I know what you're thinking, 'How can I write a $1,000 email in just 30 minutes?'
script.visual: text overlay with a question mark

script.words: First, you need to understand your audience and what they care about.
script.visual: text overlay with a brief explanation

script.words: But here's the catch, time is money, and you need to make every second count.
I've written emails that have generated over $1,000 in sales in just 30 minutes.
script.visual: text overlay with real numbers and results

script.words: And there's one more thing, you need to use the right language to resonate with your audience.
The key to writing a $1,000 email in 30 minutes is to focus on the benefits and pain points of your audience.
script.visual: text overlay with a brief explanation

script.words: Comment below with 'X' if you want to learn how to write a $1,000 email in 30 minutes.

ctaStrategy.exactWords: Comment below with 'X' if you want to learn how to write a $1,000 email in 30 minutes.

recordingNotes: Show the writer typing and the timer, use dramatic music to build tension, use text overlays to explain the process and results.
